title: Pediomelum linearifolium
taxonomy: Pediomelum linearifolium is classified in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume or pea family. Within this family, it is placed in the subfamily Faboideae. This subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Pediomelum linearifolium belonging to the tribe Loteae. The genus Pediomelum is part of the tribe Loteae, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive flowers and pods. Pediomelum linearifolium is a unique species within this classification due to its specific characteristics and distribution.
